column1: # The set of direct deps that scripts/audit-deps.sh classifies PHANTOM on
# `main` but which are known false-positives (peer-detected by their
# consumer; see docs/audit-log/120-...-decisions.md D5). The phantom-deps
# CI job posts a sticky PR comment ONLY when a run surfaces a PHANTOM that
# is NOT in this baseline — i.e. a phantom THIS PR introduced (AC-3).
# Format: one "ecosystem<TAB>package" per line. Lines starting with '#'
# and the header row are ignored.
# Maintenance: when a new genuine KEEP false-positive is discovered, add it
# here with a rationale comment (and the audit-log D5 table). Refreshing
# this baseline after a manifest cleanup is a documented maintenance task,
